TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yuli mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 210.89 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.21 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 14.21 km²), 12,299 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 4,458 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,346 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 52%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Yuli ays psgayun 15 ru 20 alang. 20 alang hani ga, Angcoh , Afih , Harawan , Lingacay , Ceroh , Patawlinan , Makotaay , Sedeng , Tokar , Lohok , Posko , Silangkong , Cihakay , Cilakesay , Cinemnemay , Takay , Satefo , Namisan , Matadim , Mangcelan .
S.PHON: juli mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), **,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu juli ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, aŋʦ~ʨoħ , a*iħ , ħarawan , liŋaʦ~ʨaj , ʦ~ʨeroħ , patawlinan , makotaaj , s~ɕe*eŋ , tokar , loħok , pos~ɕko , s~ɕilaŋkoŋ , ʦ~ʨiħakaj , ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj , ʦ~ʨinemnemaj , takaj , s~ɕate*o , namis~ɕan , mata*im , maŋʦ~ʨelan .
S.FORM: Yuli mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 210.89 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.21 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 14.21 km²), 12,299 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 4,458 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,346 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 52%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Yuli ays psgayun 15 ru 20 alang. 20 alang hani ga, Angcoh , Afih , Harawan , Lingacay , Ceroh , Patawlinan , Makotaay , Sedeng , Tokar , Lohok , Posko , Silangkong , Cihakay , Cilakesay , Cinemnemay , Takay , Satefo , Namisan , Matadim , Mangcelan .
S.PHON: juli mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), **,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu juli ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, aŋʦ~ʨoħ , a*iħ , ħarawan , liŋaʦ~ʨaj , ʦ~ʨeroħ , patawlinan , makotaaj , s~ɕe*eŋ , tokar , loħok , pos~ɕko , s~ɕilaŋkoŋ , ʦ~ʨiħakaj , ʦ~ʨilakes~ɕaj , ʦ~ʨinemnemaj , takaj , s~ɕate*o , namis~ɕan , mata*im , maŋʦ~ʨelan .
